programme.desc: McCarthy mainstay Mark seeks out a rare local treasure to welcome home old timer Tim. At long last Neil opens the Mother Lode mine to the public for tourism.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet
programme.desc: Dr. Baier treats a dog who has stopped eating. Dr. Amy tackles complex surgery to help a feisty cat. A Weimaraner deals with a life-threatening condition.

programme.title: How Do Animals Do That?
programme.desc: Experts examine how humpback whales leap so far out of the water. Plus, why do dogs tilt their heads? Why do animals swarm?

programme.title: How Do Animals Do That?
programme.desc: Experts test to see if wild wolves are smarter than domestic dogs with an interesting experiment. Can spiders really fly? How do polar bears keep warm?

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People
programme.desc: Billy and three of his sons face the long journey home on the old boat they just purchased.

programme.title: Lone Star Law
programme.desc: Down on the Mexican border, Game Wardens pull in an illegal gill net. A group caught trespassing is found with firearms and narcotics.

programme.title: The Zoo
programme.desc: The brown bears keep tearing up their exhibit, leaving zoo staff scrambling for a solution. Armani the aardvark gets treated for a tooth infection.

programme.title: Dirt Every Day
programme.sub-title: Cleaning Up With A Dumpster Truck
programme.desc: Fred Williams and Dave Chappelle build a trash-hauler off-roader to help keep the trails clean.

programme.title: Dirt Every Day
programme.sub-title: V-10 Rock Viper Goes Mud Bogging
programme.desc: The Dirt Heads transform the V-10-powered rock bouncer into a nitrous-boosted mud machine.

programme.title: Roadworthy Rescues
programme.desc: Derek returns to his North Dakota farm to revive his grandpa's 1946 Ford grain truck, sidelined since the '80s. He and his brothers race to get it running.

programme.title: Texas Metal
programme.desc: The Wells puts Duramax diesel power into a 1975 Pontiac Trans Am, while Mod Mafia overhauls a 1969 Plymouth Road Runner.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri gets cheesy and meaty, starting at a New Jersey meat market with a unique sloppy joe. In Nashville, a taco joint piles nachos with hot local flavour.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's enjoying a real deal Reuben in Grand Junction, Colorado, next-level tacos in Salt Lake City and Middle Eastern specialties in Nashville.

programme.title: Street Outlaws
programme.desc: Oklahoma City's fastest take on the trash-talking street racers from Chicago. When many of the races get rained out, both sides agree to a rematch in Oklahoma.

programme.title: Clone High
programme.sub-title: The Cloniest Place On Earth: Missile While You Work
programme.desc: Candide's solution to Scudworth's Cloney Island problem leaves the future of Clone High up in the air.

programme.title: Gremlins: Secrets of the Mogwai
programme.desc: As Gizmo is torn from his home and captured by a miserable circus, sheltered 10-year-old Sam Wing's retired treasure-hunting grandpa introduces him to a whole new world of magic.

programme.title: Gremlins: Secrets of the Mogwai
programme.desc: With Gizmo's newest batch on the loose, Sam is torn between his promise of keeping Mogwai safe or returning to his normal life, a choice that is complicated by an alliance with street thief Elle.

programme.title: Gremlins: Secrets of the Mogwai
programme.desc: All aboard! The trust between Sam, Elle, and Gizmo is tested by a hungry supernatural stranger on a train.

programme.title: Gremlins: Secrets of the Mogwai
programme.desc: When a raging storm forces her, Sam, and Gizmo to seek shelter, Elle struggles to hide her past from her friends and a too-friendly innkeeper.

programme.title: Gremlins: Secrets of the Mogwai
programme.desc: Sam, Elle, and Gizmo's nerve are tested as they follow Grandpa's map through the scariest woods they've ever encountered where more than soul-sucking, undead bureaucrats lurk in the darkness.

programme.title: Gremlins: Secrets of the Mogwai
programme.sub-title: Always Buy A God A Drink First
programme.desc: Upon arriving at the vibrant and bizarre Spirit Market, Sam and Elle must convince Gizmo's marker that not all humans are bad an argument complicated by Riley Greene's hot pursuit.

programme.title: Gremlins: Secrets of the Mogwai
programme.desc: It's a race against the clock as Sam, Elle, and Gizmo battle fearsome - yet adorable - monsters on their way to the Valley of Jade as long as Greene and the Gremlins don't catch up with them first.

programme.title: Gremlins: Secrets of the Mogwai
programme.desc: The friends celebrate their arrival at the Valley of Jade, but will Sam finally gain the confidence he desperatley needs?

programme.title: Gremlins: Secrets of the Mogwai
programme.desc: Devastated by failure, Sam and Elle must look forward to find the strength to protect Shanghai from being overrun with violent Gremlins.

programme.title: Gremlins: Secrets of the Mogwai
programme.sub-title: Never Ever Expose Them To Bright Light
programme.desc: With our heroes reunited, their bond is put to a final test as enemies from all sides converge.

programme.title: Gremlins: Secrets of the Mogwai
programme.desc: The Wing family is back in adventure mode after Sam discovers new evidence of Mogwai related problems, and Gizmo starts to act different.

programme.title: Gremlins: Secrets of the Mogwai
programme.desc: Magic has dropped our heroes short of their San Francisco destination, so now they must escape a notorious prison and its unusual guards.

programme.title: Gremlins: Secrets of the Mogwai
programme.desc: Upon reaching San Francisco's Chinatown, our heroes, and their newfound prison buddy Chang, discover its criminal underworld has been taken over by an old acquaintance.

programme.title: Gremlins: Secrets of the Mogwai
programme.desc: Sam and Chang recruit help to rescue Gizmo from Noggin's Evil Mogwai gang, while Elle discovers that her mother is alive but facing her own magical problem.

programme.title: Gremlins: Secrets of the Mogwai
programme.sub-title: There's Always A Fortune In The Cookie Factory
programme.desc: It's the battle for Chinatown. But will Chang and Chinatown's residents ultimately choose to side with our heroes?

programme.title: Gremlins: Secrets of the Mogwai
programme.sub-title: Never Get Out Of The Truck
programme.desc: Our heroes journey west to free Elle's mother, but first must free themselves from a haunted old mansion.

programme.title: Gremlins: Secrets of the Mogwai
programme.desc: Still on their western quest, our heroes are recruited to help an unusual town with their own supernatural problem: nightly hauntings by a legendary ghost.

programme.title: Gremlins: Secrets of the Mogwai
programme.desc: To reach their destination, our heroes pass through the resting place for all the west's wildest tall tales and legends. However, its temptations might finally unleash Gizmo's inner Evil Mogwai.

programme.title: Gremlins: Secrets of the Mogwai
programme.desc: As they make a treacherous journey into a mysterious desert tomb, Sam and Elle must choose between saving Elle's mother or heeding Grandpa's warning, all while Gizmo's gone missing.

programme.title: Gremlins: Secrets of the Mogwai
programme.desc: Our heroes must find a way to reunite if they want any hope of defeating a massive, monstrous force, before it destroys America.

programme.title: The Christian View
programme.desc: A fast-paced, high-energy half-hour show with a panel of sharp, well-educated, quick-witted women and men - and the occasional guest co-host - discussing today's hot topics and headlines from a Biblical perspective.

programme.title: At the Table
programme.desc: Real women, real conversations, real issues. It's where you'll find information on family, health and spirituality, but most of all, a community doing motherhood together.

programme.title: The Restoration Road
programme.desc: None of us arrive anywhere by accident. We choose, think, pray, and feel our way to our destination. Our inner GPS guides us to one of two places: destruction or restoration.

programme.title: Bible Discovery TV
programme.desc: Hosted by the Hembree family, this is a daily devotional show where Rod, Janice, Ryan and Corie walk you through the Word in a way that will forever change how you read, learn and experience the Bible.

programme.title: Answers with Bayless Conley
programme.sub-title: The Lord Is My Shepherd Part 2
programme.desc: In part two of The Lord Is My Shepherd, Pastor Bayless looks at the peace and restoration Jesus promises His sheep.

programme.title: Katherine Ruonala Ministries
programme.desc: Every time Jesus performed a miracle, He revealed the Father's goodness to us!

programme.title: The 700 Club
programme.desc: A daily program with news, interviews, lifestyle features and true-life stories from a Christian perspective, including powerful and dramatic testimonies of God touching people's lives.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: The love you have to give can be life-changing! Discover the difference you can make by trusting God and loving people.

programme.title: In Touch
programme.sub-title: The Will of God in Your Life/The Courage to Face Life's Trials
programme.desc: Tackling important issues such as parenting, finances, personal crises, emotions, and relationships, Dr Stanley fervently believes the Bible to be the inerrant Word of God.

programme.title: The Happy Camper
programme.desc: When Dillon's love life falls apart she returns to her grandfather's farm in Colorado, where she works with Jordan, a handsome hardware store owner, to restore a vintage 1960s caravan, and along the way, finds new love.

programme.title: Compassion Stories
programme.desc: Follow powerful stories highlighting the transformative work of the Compassion Child Sponsorship Program in Africa, South America, India and Asia.

programme.title: Jeni: Seeking the Extraordinary
programme.desc: Jeni and Casey are back this time road-tripping around the Pacific North West, seeing the sights, and meeting extraordinary people along the way.

programme.title: Bible Man
programme.desc: Miles Peterson had everything: Money, power, fame. Until he lost it. Then Miles finds the power of God and harnesses that power to become Bibleman.

programme.title: Sea Kids
programme.desc: The Sea Kids will help transform the heart and mind of every child as they learn how to tangibly live out biblical principles and build a strong foundation in Jesus.

programme.title: Holy Moly
programme.desc: This program turns the Bible into a living, breathing colouring book that will delight children of all ages. The series focuses on the Biblical characters' actions and emotions.

programme.title: The Blello Show
programme.desc: Join Kyle, Lyds, Extra Bear, and Stu as they share with you some cool vids, catchy catch phrases crazy challenges, things you can do in three minutes, and other random stuff to make your life awesome.

programme.title: Elevation Experience
programme.desc: The Elevation Experience with Pastor Steven Furtick features inspirational messages from Pastor Steven as well as original worship music from Elevation Church in Charlotte, North Carolina.

programme.title: A Moment in History
programme.desc: Join host Seth Udinski as he explores the most pivotal moments in history and the Bible, providing insight into the events that have shaped our world.

programme.title: Faith Runs Deep
programme.desc: In this new program from the producers of the award-winning series, Jesus the Game Changer, host Karl Faase travels around Australia in an iconic Holden ute, discovering a rich and inspiring history of faith.

programme.title: Drive Thru History: Ends of the Earth
programme.desc: Ends of the Earth takes viewers on a 19-episode, global trek to every corner of the earth, to show how God has used ordinary people throughout history to take His saving grace to every nation and people.

programme.title: Good Guys Doing Good
programme.desc: Host Tim Bisagno sets out on a journey across the USA to find men of God serving the Lord in adventurous, exciting and unique ways. Follow Tim as he travels, participates, laughs, cries, honours and showcases Good Guys.

programme.title: Miraculous Victories of Israel
programme.desc: What happens when the God of Israel intervenes in the battles of His people? Miraculous victories occur - victories that are sometimes inexplicable and often unbelievable.

programme.title: Bible Land Passages
programme.sub-title: Judah - David's Training Ground of Faith
programme.desc: Read about places like Beersheba, Jericho, Jerusalem, Caesarea, and cities surrounding the Sea of Galilee, and discover that those places exist just as the Bible describes.

programme.title: The Incredible Journey
programme.desc: Gary Kent is passionate about sharing the good news of Christ and preparing people for the soon coming of Jesus, offering Biblical answers to life's questions.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Positioned In His Protection Pt 1 of 4
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Direct from Houston, Texas, join Joel and Victoria Osteen and the team from Lakewood Church for a session of powerful music and empowering preaching.

programme.title: The Way of the Master
programme.desc: The Living Waters team takes the gospel to London during the Coronation of King Charles.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: The love you have to give can be life-changing! Discover the difference you can make by trusting God and loving people.

programme.title: War Room
programme.desc: The Jordan's are a middle-class couple who seemingly have it all. In reality, their marriage is a war zone. Elizabeth discovers she can start fighting for her family instead of against them.

programme.title: Compassion Stories
programme.desc: Follow powerful stories highlighting the transformative work of the Compassion Child Sponsorship Program in Africa, South America, India and Asia.

programme.title: Power for Living
programme.sub-title: The Holy Spirit Your Best Friend
programme.desc: Powerful words from Evangelist and Pastor Bill Newman.

programme.title: In Touch
programme.sub-title: The Will of God in Your Life/The Courage to Face Life's Trials
programme.desc: Tackling important issues such as parenting, finances, personal crises, emotions, and relationships, Dr Stanley fervently believes the Bible to be the inerrant Word of God.

programme.title: David Pawson
programme.desc: Why was the Bible written? UK theologian, Cambridge scholar, pastor and Bible teacher, David Pawson explores scripture and discovers some hidden gems.

programme.title: North to Home
programme.desc: Suzanne McBride and her three adopted daughters. This looks like a great time for family reunion, but the sisters are wrestling with unique challenges that threaten to derail this special occasion.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Positioned In His Protection Pt 1 of 4
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Friends and Heroes
programme.desc: Friends and Heroes is an animated children's adventure based in Ancient Egypt, Israel and Rome. The story follows two young friends Macky and Portia as they fight for justice against the Roman Empire.

programme.title: Night Owls & Early Birds
programme.sub-title: God's Love for us is Endless
programme.desc: Join Hoot, Savannah, Screech, Charlie, and Steve as they take a deeper dive into the truths found in God's Word.

programme.title: The Garden
programme.sub-title: The Truth is the Mane Thing
programme.desc: Lenny Lion and Lucy Lamb are the caretakers for a magical garden where anything can grow. They work for The Boss (God) who gives them a new assignment to complete in every episode.

programme.title: Impact for Life
programme.desc: In today's episode, Peter Mortlock teaches on the topic of sacrifice. He shares how the church is built on sacrifice through Jesus and that through sacrifice comes great things.

programme.title: Be Great. Do Good
programme.desc: Businesses often look to market themselves with information about what they do. Instead customers connect with the unique story that helps a business stand out.

programme.title: The Prince Of Egypt: The Musical
programme.desc: A live stage recording of the musical based on DreamWorks Animation's 1998 film adapted from the biblical story of Moses.

programme.title: Transformers One
programme.desc: The untold origin story of Optimus Prime and Megatron, better known as sworn enemies, but who once were friends bonded like brothers.

programme.title: Lisa Frankenstein
programme.desc: A misunderstood teenager and a reanimated Victorian corpse embark on a murderous journey together to find love, happiness, and a few missing body parts.

programme.title: Kraven the Hunter
programme.desc: Kraven's complex relationship with his ruthless father starts him down a path of vengeance, motivating him to become not only the greatest hunter in the world, but also one of its most feared.

programme.title: Drive-Away Dolls
programme.desc: Free-spirited Jamie and her demure friend, Marian, embark on a road trip to Tallahassee for a fresh start, but things go wrong when they meet inept criminals along the way.

programme.title: Emilia Perez
programme.desc: Follows four women in Mexico chasing happiness. Cartel leader Emilia recruits lawyer Rita to fake her death and live authentically as her true self.

programme.title: The Convert
programme.desc: A preacher's violent past is drawn into question and his faith tested as he becomes caught up in a bloody war between Maori tribes after arriving at a British settlement in the 1830s.

programme.title: Flight 149: Hostage of War
programme.desc: In 1990, Iraq takes the world by surprise and invades Kuwait. BA Flight 149 from London lands in Kuwait for a scheduled stop with men, women and children aboard. The plane never reaches its final destination.

programme.title: Greedy People
programme.desc: Residents of a small island town navigate a murder and the discovery of a million dollars, a series of increasingly bad decisions upend the once peaceful community.

programme.title: Sweet Dreams
programme.desc: Follows Morris, who must coach a misfit softball team of his fellow housemates during his mandatory stay at Sweet Dreams sober living in order to get his life back on track.

programme.title: Spit
programme.desc: An ex-con returns to Australia after 20 years, gets detained, faces old enemies, makes new friends, and teaches his version of mateship while staying one step ahead.

programme.title: Golda
programme.desc: Focuses on the intensely dramatic and high-stakes responsibilities and decisions that Golda Meir, also known as the Iron Lady of Israel, faces during the Yom Kippur War.

programme.title: Saturday Night
programme.desc: Tensions run high as producer Lorne Michaels and a ferocious troupe of young comedians and writers prepare for the first broadcast of "Saturday Night Live" on Oct. 11, 1975.

programme.title: Lights Out
programme.desc: A homeless veteran gets caught up in the world of underground fight clubs.

programme.title: Despicable Me 4
programme.desc: Gru welcomes a new member to the family, Gru Jr, who's intent on tormenting his dad. However, their peaceful existence soon comes crashing down, when criminal mastermind Maxime Le Mal escapes from prison.

programme.title: Sing
programme.desc: A dapper koala who has fallen on hard times has one final chance to restore his crumbling theatre by producing the world's greatest singing competition.

programme.title: The Grinch
programme.desc: A cynical grump goes on a mission to steal Christmas, only to have his heart changed by a young girl's generous holiday spirit.

programme.title: Minions
programme.desc: Three unemployed henchmen find themselves working for the world's first-ever female supervillain and her inventor husband, who plan to take over the world.

programme.title: Despicable Me
programme.desc: In a happy neighbourhood with picket fences and rose bushes sits a black house with a dead lawn. In the cellar is a hideout where a dastardly villain is plotting a huge heist - he wants to steal the moon!

programme.title: Despicable Me 2
programme.desc: Get ready for more Minion madness! Just as Gru has given up being super-bad to be a super-dad, the Anti-Villain League recruits him to track down a new criminal mastermind and save the world.

programme.title: Despicable Me 3
programme.desc: Everyone's favourite reformed super-villain Gru returns for more adventures with Lucy, their daughters, and the lovably zany minions.

programme.title: Despicable Me 4
programme.desc: Gru welcomes a new member to the family, Gru Jr, who's intent on tormenting his dad. However, their peaceful existence soon comes crashing down, when criminal mastermind Maxime Le Mal escapes from prison.

programme.title: Dr. Seuss' the Lorax
programme.desc: A young boy searches for the one thing that will enable him to win the affection of the girl of his dreams. He must discover the story of the Lorax, the creature who fights to protect his world.

programme.title: Sing
programme.desc: A dapper koala who has fallen on hard times has one final chance to restore his crumbling theatre by producing the world's greatest singing competition.

programme.title: Despicable Me 2
programme.desc: Get ready for more Minion madness! Just as Gru has given up being super-bad to be a super-dad, the Anti-Villain League recruits him to track down a new criminal mastermind and save the world.

programme.title: Migration

programme.title: Minions
programme.desc: Three unemployed henchmen find themselves working for the world's first-ever female supervillain and her inventor husband, who plan to take over the world.

programme.title: Captain Underpants: The First Epic Movie
programme.desc: George and Harold are BFFs who accidentally hypnotise their principal into believing he's the hero named Captain Underpants. They must stop a new teacher who is bent on ridding the world of laughter.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (2014)
programme.desc: Based on the hit '90s animation, the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles are back and have teamed up with news reporter April O'Neill to save New York City from the evil Shredder.

programme.title: Suicide Squad
programme.desc: A secret government agency recruits some of the most dangerous, imprisoned, supervillains to execute high-risk, black-ops missions in exchange for clemency.

programme.title: Mr. Peabody & Sherman
programme.desc: When Mr Peabody and Sherman break the rules of time travel by meeting many of history's greatest characters, they must repair the damage they have done before it changes their world forever.

programme.title: Paddington 2
programme.desc: Now happily settled with the Brown family, Paddington picks up a series of odd jobs to buy the perfect present for his Aunt Lucy's 100th birthday, only for the gift to be stolen.

programme.title: Over the Hedge
programme.desc: The woodland friends awaken from their long winter's nap to discover that a large, green hedge has cropped up right through the middle of their once-natural habitat.

programme.title: Stuart Little 2
programme.desc: Stuart, the Little family's lonely mouse 'son', gets into strife by befriending a canary.

programme.title: Early Man
programme.desc: Caveman Dug, his sidekick, Hognob, and their fearless new friend, Goona, must unite their Stone Age tribe against the mighty Bronze Age enemy, Lord Nooth.

programme.title: The Croods
programme.desc: The story of the world's first family road trip. After their cave is destroyed, the Crood family must embark on a comedy adventure into strange and spectacular territory in search of a new home.

programme.title: The Croods: A New Age
programme.desc: In search of a new home, the Croods encounter the more sophisticated Betterman family. A new threat forces the two families to set aside their differences to avoid extinction.

programme.title: Top Cat Begins
programme.desc: Poor, lonely and living on the streets, Top Cat meets Benny, a naive and good-hearted cat looking for adventure.

programme.title: Back To The Future III
programme.desc: Marty McFly ends up in the wild west of 1885 to save mad scientist Doc Brown from a crazed gunfighter. It's the final chapter in the time-travelling comedy series.

programme.title: Pixels
programme.desc: When aliens discover video feeds of classic arcade games and misinterpret them as a declaration of war, they attack the Earth, using the video games as models for their assaults.

programme.title: Arthur Christmas
programme.desc: On Christmas night at the North Pole, Santa's youngest son looks to use his father's high-tech operation for an urgent mission.

programme.title: Wallace & Gromit: Curse Of Were-Rabbit
programme.desc: Wallace and his loyal dog, Gromit, set out to discover the mystery behind the garden sabotage that plagues their village and threatens the annual giant vegetable growing contest.

programme.title: The Flintstones
programme.desc: After an aptitude test mix-up, Fred Flintstone trades his job as Bronto-crane operator for a vice presidency. An evil executive then plots to use Fred as the fall guy in an embezzlement scheme.

programme.title: Turbo
programme.desc: A snail that has forever dreamed of the ability to move fast is granted his wish after a freak accident. Now he's out to win the Indy 500.

programme.title: Scoob!
programme.desc: With hundreds of cases solved and adventures shared, Scooby and the gang face their most challenging mystery ever: a plot to unleash the ghost dog Cerberus upon the world.

programme.title: An American Tail
programme.desc: Fievel the mouse travels from Russia to America with his family in the late 1800s to seek freedom from cat persecution.

programme.title: The Mummy (2017)
programme.desc: Thought safely entombed beneath the unforgiving desert, an ancient princess, whose destiny was unjustly taken from her, is awakened, bringing terrors that defy human comprehension.

programme.title: Fast & Furious Presents: Hobbs & Shaw
programme.desc: Hobbs and Shaw, the trash-talking sworn enemies, must team up to take down a cyber-genetically enhanced anarchist with a bio weapon that threatens the fate of humanity.

programme.title: Van Helsing
programme.desc: Legendary monster hunter Van Helsing must rely on the help of the beautiful and mysterious Anna Valeris as he engages in an epic battle with the ultimate forces of darkness.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: A battle between two alien robot clans, the Autobots and the Decepticons, is reignited on Earth, with a teenage boy being the only one who holds the power to stop it.

programme.title: The Fate of the Furious
programme.desc: When a woman seduces Dom into the world of crime, the crew face trials that will test them like never before.

programme.title: Venom: Let There Be Carnage
programme.desc: In search of his next big story, Eddie lands an exclusive interview with convicted murderer Cletus Kasady, who discovers Eddie's secret and becomes the host for Carnage.

programme.title: Resident Evil: Welcome to Raccoon City
programme.desc: Survivors try to uncover the truth behind the evil Umbrella Corp while battling bloodthirsty zombies in the wastelands of Raccoon City.

programme.title: Bastille Day
programme.desc: When a reckless CIA agent and a brilliant pickpocket uncover a large-scale conspiracy, they must work together in order to take down a common enemy.

programme.title: Land of the Dead
programme.desc: Packed with more heart-pounding and blood-curdling thrills than any theatre could show, this special unleashes the ultimate vision of George A Romero's latest living-dead shock-fest.

programme.title: Death Race
programme.desc: In a future where extreme sports have grown into TV reality bloodlust, a speedway champion is ordered by a ruthless warden to suit up and drive - or never see his little girl again.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: A spy is on a mission to disprove false accusations made against him by the very government organisation that he works for.

programme.title: Battleship
programme.desc: Based on the classic Hasbro naval combat game, this is the story of an international fleet of ships that come across an alien armada while on a naval war games exercise.
This film is a ferocious retelling of the ancient Battle of Thermopylae, depicting the titanic clash in which King Leonidas and 300 Spartans fought Xerxes and his massive Persian army to the death.

programme.title: Identity Thief

programme.title: Beetlejuice
programme.desc: What's a couple of stay-at-home ghosts to do when their beloved home is taken over by yuppies? They call on Beetlejuice, the afterlife's freelance bio-exorcist, to scare off the family.

programme.title: Johnny English Strikes Again
programme.desc: After a cyber-attack reveals the identity of all of the active undercover agents in Britain, Johnny English is forced to come out of retirement to find the mastermind hacker.

programme.title: Wanderlust
programme.desc: Rattled by sudden unemployment, a Manhattan couple surveys alternative living options, ultimately deciding to experiment with living on a rural commune where free love rules.

programme.desc: Dave, a kangaroo suffering from chronic arthritis, tries cryotherapy. A large group of rambunctious gharials are trained to patiently wait for their food.

programme.title: Texas Metal
programme.desc: The Wells puts Duramax diesel power into a 1975 Pontiac Trans Am, while Mod Mafia overhauls a 1969 Plymouth Road Runner.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: When Mike finds a 1992 Corrado G60 smothered in aftermarket mods, he wonders if they can make a profit by returning it to standard.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters: Classic Cars
programme.desc: Drew and Paul rescue a classic: a Vauxhall Viva. The car was extensively modified in the 1960s but after years in storage, it's well past its best.

programme.title: Faster with Newbern and Cotten

programme.title: Street Outlaws
programme.desc: The Farmtruck is back with a new bad ass motor and Chuck has his turbos lined out on The Death Trap.

programme.title: Gremlins: Secrets of the Mogwai
programme.desc: As they make a treacherous journey into a mysterious desert tomb, Sam and Elle must choose between saving Elle's mother or heeding Grandpa's warning, all while Gizmo's gone missing.

programme.title: Gremlins: Secrets of the Mogwai
programme.desc: Our heroes must find a way to reunite if they want any hope of defeating a massive, monstrous force, before it destroys America.

programme.title: My Adventures With Superman
programme.sub-title: Adventures Of A Normal Man Pt. 1
programme.desc: Secret alien Clark and Jimmy start their internship at The Daily Planet and meet fellow intern Lois Lane - who ropes them into investigating stolen military robots threatening Metropolis!

programme.title: My Adventures With Superman
programme.sub-title: Adventures Of A Normal Man Pt. 2
programme.desc: Clark returns to the Kent farm with questions about where he's from - and who he wants to be. Meanwhile, Lois and Jimmy track down the mercenary Livewire and encounter "Superman" once again!

programme.title: My Adventures With Superman
programme.desc: Lois wants to interview Superman and Clark must figure out how to help her while protecting his secret identity! Meanwhile, criminal ring Intergang gets their hands on unstable weapons.

programme.title: My Adventures With Superman
programme.sub-title: Let's Go To Ivo Tower, You Say
programme.desc: Clark, Lois and Jimmy cover a glitzy gala hosted by tech-billionaire Dr Ivo - but while Clark and Lois wonder if this counts as a date, Ivo unleashes his newest invention to bring down Superman!

programme.title: My Adventures With Superman
programme.sub-title: You Will Believe A Man Can Lie
programme.desc: Lois uncovers a secret in Metropolis and is determined to get to the truth. Superman tracks down dangerous weapons in the city and finds himself in the crosshairs of Task Force X.

programme.title: My Adventures With Superman
programme.desc: When Jimmy gets kidnapped, it's up to Lois and Clark to save him - but rescuing Jimmy will lead them into danger as they deal with mad scientists, military secrets, and relationship woes!

programme.title: My Adventures With Superman
programme.desc: Clark tries to plan a normal date without any Superman problems - but gets interrupted when Mr. Mxyzptlk sweeps him, Jimmy, and Lois into a high-stakes, multiverse-hopping chase!

programme.title: My Adventures With Superman
programme.desc: Lois meets her journalism idol, Vicki Vale - only for Vicki to make Lois question her loyalty to Superman. Meanwhile, Superman hunts down Task Force X while dealing with a new power!

programme.title: My Adventures With Superman
programme.desc: Superman gets answers to who he is and where he came from, while coming face-to-face with The General, leader of Task Force X. Meanwhile, Lois and Jimmy must find Superman before Dr. Ivo destroys Metropolis!

programme.title: My Adventures With Superman
programme.desc: It's Thanksgiving and Clark, Lois and Jimmy are heading to the Kent farm to celebrate - but the holiday turns into a fight for survival as Task Force X, family, and Kryptonite collide!

programme.title: My Adventures With Superman
programme.sub-title: More Things In Heaven And Earth
programme.desc: Clark agonizes over what to do for his and Lois' first Valentine's Day; Visions of his father lead him, Jimmy, and Lois to the remains of his spaceship and the new villains of Task Force X.

programme.title: My Adventures With Superman
programme.desc: Perry saddles Jimmy with a new team to run Flamebird; Clark and Lois investigate Stryker Penitentiary and discover how far Amanda Waller will go to rid the world of Superman.

programme.title: My Adventures With Superman
programme.desc: Clark's life falls apart as The General goes into hiding in Clark's flat. Jimmy struggles with being a leader, and Lois goes toe-to-toe with Vicki Vale as they track down missing scientists.

programme.title: My Adventures With Superman
programme.desc: Jimmy gets invited to the STAR Labs Symposium. Clark joins him for support, but Lex Luthor takes over; the General flees, and Lois chases after him.

programme.title: My Adventures With Superman
programme.desc: Lois and Clark's relationship come to the breaking point when Superman receives the title of Metropolis' most eligible bachelor; Jimmy gives a girl a tour of the city.

programme.title: My Adventures With Superman
programme.sub-title: The Machine Who Would Be Empire
programme.desc: Kidnapped and far from home, Superman bonds with his cousin Kara. He discovers the truth about Krypton from the last Kryptonians in existence.

programme.title: My Adventures With Superman
programme.desc: Lois and Jimmy recruit mercenaries and mad scientists to help them steal a spaceship out from under the nose of Task Force X.

programme.title: My Adventures With Superman
programme.desc: Lois and Jimmy confront Kara and make a plan to rescue Clark. Meanwhile, Brainiac delves into Superman's mind to figure out what makes him tick and how to tear him apart!

programme.title: My Adventures With Superman
programme.desc: Jimmy and Kara race back to Metropolis to stop Brainiac's invasion of Earth; Lois tries to free Clark from Brainiac's control, only to lose herself in an alternate reality.

programme.title: My Adventures With Superman
programme.desc: Superman, Kara, Lois and Jimmy team up to fight Brainiac; Superman has to choose between saving Earth and saving the people he loves.

programme.desc: Every time Jesus performed a miracle, He revealed the Father's goodness to us!

programme.desc: Two stories, told by the VeggieTales gang, talk about why it's important to love your neighbour.

programme.title: Deditos
programme.sub-title: God And His People In The Wilderness
programme.desc: This quirky kids show introduces children to classic stories from the Old Testament using finger puppets.

programme.title: New Horizons
programme.sub-title: Life Hacks: Pocket tips from the Book of Proverbs Pt8
programme.desc: Marc explores the wisdom of the Book of Proverbs looking at the wisdom that God has provided, so that we can observe it and put it into practice in our day to day lives.

programme.title: Canada Out Of Doors
programme.desc: Highlights the adventures of Northern Ontario tourism outfitter and seaplane pilot Joel Theriault from Air Ivanhoe. A blend of flying, exploring, construction and renovations, camp life, hunting, and cooking of wild game.

programme.title: Lights Out
programme.desc: A homeless veteran gets caught up in the world of underground fight clubs.

programme.title: A Quiet Place: Day One
programme.desc: A young woman named Sam finds herself trapped in New York City during the early stages of an invasion by alien creatures with ultra-sensitive hearing.

programme.title: Depravity
programme.desc: Friends find themselves on a dangerous path as they try to cover up the death of an innocent man.

programme.title: Bogart: Life Comes in Flashes
programme.desc: Filmmaker Kathryn Ferguson explores the remarkable life and legacy of Hollywood legend and cultural icon Humphrey Bogart, narrated in his own words.

programme.title: Freud's Last Session
programme.desc: On the eve of World War II, Sigmund Freud and C S Lewis gather to discuss the existence of God and the future of mankind.

programme.title: Maria
programme.desc: Famed opera singer Maria Callas retreats to Paris in the 1970s after a glamorous yet tumultuous life in the public eye.

programme.title: Hypnotic
programme.desc: Determined to find his missing daughter, Austin detective Danny Rourke finds himself spiralling down a rabbit hole while investigating a series of reality-bending bank robberies.

programme.title: Shoshana
programme.desc: Two British police officers Thomas Wilkin and Geoffrey Morton in their hunt for charismatic poet and Zionist freedom fighter Avraham Stern, who was plotting to evict British authorities.

programme.title: Christmas Eve in Miller's Point
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, a family gathers for what may be their last holiday in their ancestral home. As tensions rise, a teen sneaks out with friends to take over the wintry suburb for herself.

programme.title: The Best Christmas Pageant Ever
programme.desc: Six unruly kids wreak havoc and surprise during the town's annual Christmas performance, leaving no one prepared for the mayhem.

programme.title: Thelma
programme.desc: When 93-year-old Thelma Post gets duped by a phone scammer pretending to be her grandson, she sets out on a treacherous quest across the city to reclaim what was taken from her.

programme.title: The Heist Before Christmas
programme.desc: A Christmas-hating boy meets two Santas in the woods, one of whom claims to have fallen from his sleigh, but he is more interested in the other man when he learns he is on the run for robbing a bank.

programme.title: The Color Purple
programme.desc: Torn from her sister Nettie and her children, Celie faces many hardships in her life, including an abusive husband. Celie finds strength in the unbreakable bonds of sisterhood.

programme.title: Suicide Squad
programme.desc: A secret government agency recruits some of the most dangerous, imprisoned, supervillains to execute high-risk, black-ops missions in exchange for clemency.

programme.title: Hulk
programme.desc: A freak lab accident reveals Bruce's heroic impulses, but also unleashes his inner demons, and he becomes the most powerful being on the face of the Earth: a superhero and a monster.

programme.title: Blade
programme.desc: Blade - half-mortal, half-immortal - fights vampires who crave his special blood type for their plan to exterminate the human race.

programme.title: Batman Begins
programme.desc: Bruce Wayne returns to Gotham and unveils his alter-ego: Batman, a masked crusader who uses his strength, intellect, and high-tech deceptions to fight the sinister forces that threaten the city.

programme.title: Man of Steel
programme.desc: A man learns that he has extraordinary powers and is not of this Earth. But the hero in him must emerge if he is to save the world from annihilation and become the symbol of hope for all mankind.

programme.title: Aquaman
programme.desc: The origin story of half-human, half-Atlantean Arthur Curry takes him on the journey of his lifetime - to discover whether he is worthy of who he was born to be: a king.

programme.title: Aquaman and the Lost Kingdom
programme.desc: Seeking revenge for his father's death, Black Manta uses the Black Trident's power to become a formidable foe. To defend Atlantis, Aquaman must forge an alliance with his imprisoned brother.

programme.title: Batman Begins
programme.desc: Bruce Wayne returns to Gotham and unveils his alter-ego: Batman, a masked crusader who uses his strength, intellect, and high-tech deceptions to fight the sinister forces that threaten the city.

programme.title: The Dark Knight
programme.desc: A rising criminal mastermind known as The Joker thrusts Gotham into anarchy and forces Batman closer to crossing the fine line between hero and vigilante.

programme.title: The Dark Knight Rises
programme.desc: It has been years since Batman vanished into the night, turning from hero to fugitive. Everything will change with the arrival of a cunning cat burglar, and the emergence of masked terrorist, Bane.

programme.title: Watchmen: Chapter I
programme.desc: In an alternate world, the murder of a government sponsored superhero draws his outlawed colleagues out of retirement, into a mystery that threatens their lives and the world itself.

programme.title: An American Tail
programme.desc: Fievel the mouse travels from Russia to America with his family in the late 1800s to seek freedom from cat persecution.

programme.title: The Angry Birds Movie
programme.desc: When an island populated by happy, flightless birds is visited by mysterious outsiders, it is up to two unlikely outcasts, and birds with temper problems, to set things right.

programme.title: The Boss Baby: Family Business
programme.desc: Boss Baby continues to navigate the cutthroat corporate jungle gym of Baby Corp, while angling to achieve the near-impossible: the work-life balance of a modern career baby.

programme.title: Jumanji
programme.desc: Two kids playing a magic jungle board game release a man trapped in it for 26 years, and a host of dangers that can only be stopped by finishing the game.

programme.title: Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: Four high school kids discover an old video game console and are immediately drawn into the game's jungle setting, learning you don't just play Jumanji, you must survive it.

programme.title: Jumanji: The Next Level
programme.desc: As they return to Jumanji to rescue one of their own, nothing is as they expect. They will have to brave parts unknown and unexplored to escape the world's most dangerous game.

programme.title: Journey 2: The Mysterious Island
programme.desc: The journey begins when young adventurer Sean receives a coded distress signal from a mysterious island where no island should exist.

programme.title: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: An experiment with dinosaurs created from DNA becomes a disaster when sabotage sets the prehistoric monsters loose in an island theme park.

programme.title: The Pirates Who Don't Do Anything
programme.desc: Those vege-eating boys are back! This time they're cabin boys in a pirate theatre and are called upon to put aside their lazy, cowardly ways and help a princess rescue her brother who's been kidnapped.

programme.title: Penguins of Madagascar
programme.desc: Recruited from youngsters into the global spy game, four penguins are called into action by a mysterious espionage organisation in order to save the world from a villainous octopus.

programme.title: The Secret Garden (2020)
programme.desc: When Mary's parents suddenly die, she's sent to live with her uncle on his remote country estate deep in the Yorkshire moors. While exploring, she discovers a hidden magical garden.

programme.title: Matilda
programme.desc: A wonderful little girl who happens to be a genius, along with her understanding teacher, outwit the worst parents and the worst school principal imaginable.

programme.title: Smurfs: The Lost Village
programme.desc: A mysterious map sets Smurfette and her friends on a thrilling race through the Forbidden Forest to find a mysterious lost village before the evil wizard Gargamel does.

programme.title: Tom & Jerry
programme.desc: A legendary rivalry re-emerges when Jerry moves into NYC's finest hotel on the eve of the wedding of the century, forcing the desperate event planner to hire Tom to get rid of him.

programme.title: An American Tail: Fievel Goes West
programme.desc: Lured out west by the crafty Cat R. Waul, Fievel joins forces with famed lawdog Wylie Blurp to thwart a sinister plot to transform unsuspecting settlers into ... mouse burgers!

programme.title: Robin Hood (2010)
programme.desc: In an age of oppression and shameless tyranny, an outlaw becomes the unlikely hero that saves a nation and inspires generations to fight for freedom.

programme.title: Troy
programme.desc: For the love of a beautiful woman a city will burn to the ground. An epic tale of honour, war, forbidden passion and the towering Trojan Horse.

programme.title: Repo Men
programme.desc: Set in the near future when artificial organs can be bought on credit, it revolves around a man who struggles to make the payments on a heart he has purchased.

programme.title: F9: The Fast Saga
programme.desc: The true meaning of family gets tested like never before as Dom Toretto takes the team on a worldwide ride with high-stakes action, old friends and a surprising new foe.

programme.title: Skyscraper
programme.desc: A security expert must infiltrate a burning skyscraper, 225 storeys above ground, when his family are trapped inside by criminals.

programme.title: Doom
programme.desc: A frantic call for help from a remote research station on Mars sends a team of mercenary Marines into action.

programme.title: Punisher: War Zone
programme.desc: The most determined of all vigilantes in Marvel Comics wages a no-holds-barred, one-man war against a horribly disfigured crime lord called Jigsaw.

programme.title: The Dark Tower
programme.desc: Roland Deschain and the Man in Black share an ancient vendetta: they must fight to the death in an epic battle over the fate of the universe.

programme.title: Jack Reacher: Never Go Back
programme.desc: When an Army Major is framed for treason, Reacher discovers she's the target of a massive government conspiracy and risks everything to take down the corrupt organisation.

programme.title: Dragonheart: Vengeance
programme.desc: After his family is killed, Lukas sets out on an epic quest for revenge, forming an unlikely trio with an ice breathing dragon and a swashbuckling mercenary.

programme.title: The Meg
programme.desc: Deep-sea rescue diver Jonas must confront his fears to save a crew trapped on the ocean floor in a submersible that's been attacked by a massive creature.

programme.title: Machete
programme.desc: Left for dead after clashing with notorious Mexican drug kingpin Torrez, Machete escapes to Texas, looking to disappear and forget his tragic past. What he finds is a web of corruption and deceit.

programme.title: Venom
programme.desc: When Eddie Brock acquires the powers of a Symbiote, he will have to release his alter-ego 'Venom' to save his life.

programme.title: Police Academy
programme.desc: As a crime wave sweeps the city and the police department suffers a shortage of officers, the mayor decrees that admission to the police academy will be open to any and all applicants.

programme.title: Housos Vs. Authority
programme.desc: A petty crook embarks on a road trip to Uluru in a drug-laden campervan.

programme.title: Grown Ups
programme.desc: Five high school pals reunite after 30 years at a July Fourth celebration and wrestle with the challenges of adulthood. No one wants to be the grown-up of the gang.

programme.title: Ghostbusters: Afterlife
programme.desc: When a single mother and her two kids arrive in a small town, they begin to discover their connection to the original Ghostbusters and the secret legacy their grandfather left behind.

programme.title: Forgetting Sarah Marshall
programme.desc: A struggling musician escapes to Hawaii on a vacation after he is jilted by his television star girlfriend Sarah for another guy, only to find his ex staying in the same hotel with her new man.

programme.desc: A nerdy, introverted groom seeks the services of a company that supplies best men for grooms in need. What ensues is a hilarious wedding charade as they try to pull off the big con.

programme.desc: After receiving a distress call, the crew of a nearby vessel swoop in to hunt for precious cargo. Then, as Sam's health continues to fail, Ursula accepts help from a mysterious stranger.

programme.desc: Can one hour a week really change a child's future? In Melbourne, Marion Macaulay proves it can. Through Kids Hope, she's showing how consistent mentorship can be a beacon of hope for young lives.

programme.desc: Torn from her sister Nettie and her children, Celie faces many hardships in her life, including an abusive husband. Celie finds strength in the unbreakable bonds of sisterhood.

programme.title: Anora
programme.desc: Anora, a Brooklyn sex worker, marries an oligarch's son. But when the news reaches Russia, his parents rush to New York to have the marriage annulled, threatening her fairytale.

programme.title: Mean Girls (2024)
programme.desc: In a musical twist of the cult classic, new student Cady Heron is welcomed by the popular girls called The Plastics. However, Cady falls for queen bee Regina's ex-boyfriend.

programme.title: Wicked
programme.desc: In Oz, two clashing witches, Elphaba and Glinda, form an unlikely friendship. Elphaba, wrongly labeled wicked, seeks to expose the corrupt Wizard ruling the land.

programme.title: Wonka
programme.desc: A young Willy Wonka, chock-full of ideas and determined to change the world one bite at a time, proves that the best things in life begin with a dream.

programme.title: Dune: Part Two

programme.desc: The Spengler family team up with the original Ghostbusters to save the world from a second Ice Age.

programme.title: I Saw the TV Glow

programme.title: The Holdovers
programme.desc: A curmudgeonly instructor at a prep school is forced to remain on campus during Christmas break to babysit a handful of students with nowhere to go.

programme.title: Ezra
programme.desc: Comedian Max co-parents autistic son Ezra with ex-wife Jenna. Faced with crucial decisions about Ezra's future, Max and Ezra go on a life-changing cross-country road trip.

programme.title: The Caine Mutiny Court-Martial
programme.desc: A naval officer stands trial for mutiny after taking command from a ship captain he feels is acting in an unstable way, putting in danger both the ship and its crew.

programme.title: Cassino in Ischia
programme.desc: Nic Cassino goes to Italy to work with struggling Italian directors on the first-ever "Neo-Realist" action movie in an effort to revitalize his career.

programme.title: Watchmen: Chapter I
programme.desc: In an alternate world, the murder of a government sponsored superhero draws his outlawed colleagues out of retirement, into a mystery that threatens their lives and the world itself.

programme.title: The Punisher
programme.desc: An undercover FBI agent is crushed when his wife and children are killed after witnessing a mafia hit. With nothing left to live for he becomes The Punisher, a one-man judge, jury, and executioner.

programme.title: Punisher: War Zone
programme.desc: The most determined of all vigilantes in Marvel Comics wages a no-holds-barred, one-man war against a horribly disfigured crime lord called Jigsaw.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse
programme.desc: Brooklyn teen Miles Morales is introduced to the limitless possibilities of the Spider-Verse, where more than one can wear the mask.

programme.title: The Dark Knight
programme.desc: A rising criminal mastermind known as The Joker thrusts Gotham into anarchy and forces Batman closer to crossing the fine line between hero and vigilante.

programme.title: Suicide Squad
programme.desc: A secret government agency recruits some of the most dangerous, imprisoned, supervillains to execute high-risk, black-ops missions in exchange for clemency.

programme.title: Kraven the Hunter
programme.desc: Kraven's complex relationship with his ruthless father starts him down a path of vengeance, motivating him to become not only the greatest hunter in the world, but also one of its most feared.

programme.title: Morbius
programme.desc: Biochemist Dr Michael Morbius tries to cure himself of a rare blood disease, but he inadvertently infects himself with a form of vampirism instead.

programme.title: Hulk
programme.desc: A freak lab accident reveals Bruce's heroic impulses, but also unleashes his inner demons, and he becomes the most powerful being on the face of the Earth: a superhero and a monster.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (2014)
programme.desc: Based on the hit '90s animation, the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles are back and have teamed up with news reporter April O'Neill to save New York City from the evil Shredder.

programme.title: Blade
programme.desc: Blade - half-mortal, half-immortal - fights vampires who crave his special blood type for their plan to exterminate the human race.

programme.title: Megamind
programme.desc: Megamind is the most brilliant super-villain the world has ever known - and the least successful. But when Metro City is threatened by a new villain, can the world's biggest 'mind' actually save the day?

programme.title: Man of Steel
programme.desc: A man learns that he has extraordinary powers and is not of this Earth. But the hero in him must emerge if he is to save the world from annihilation and become the symbol of hope for all mankind.

programme.title: An American Tail: Fievel Goes West
programme.desc: Lured out west by the crafty Cat R. Waul, Fievel joins forces with famed lawdog Wylie Blurp to thwart a sinister plot to transform unsuspecting settlers into ... mouse burgers!

programme.title: Rise of the Guardians
programme.desc: When the evil spirit Pitch launches an assault on Earth, the immortal Guardians must join forces for the first time to protect the hopes, beliefs and imagination of children all over the world.

programme.title: Nanny McPhee
programme.desc: Move over, Mary Poppins. Nanny McPhee is a wonderfully hideous, mysterious nanny hired to tame seven brats with a feckless father.

programme.title: The Lost World: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: It has been four years since the disaster at Jurassic Park and two groups are in a race against time that will determine the fate of the remote island's prehistoric inhabitants.

programme.title: Spider-Man 2
programme.desc: Peter Parker struggles to juggle his life with his Spider-Man persona as a new foe emerges: the deranged scientist, Otto Octavius.

programme.title: Shrek the Third
programme.desc: Dad-to-be Shrek and his posse embark on a new, trouble-filled adventure, in search of their next king. Another fun family romp.

programme.title: Home
programme.desc: When a cute alien lands on Earth and finds himself on the run from his own race, he forms an unlikely friendship with a brave little girl who's on a quest of her own.

programme.title: The Secret Life of Pets
programme.desc: A quick-witted terrier finds his position in the household threatened when his master brings home a stray mongrel with no polish.

programme.title: The Secret Life of Pets 2
programme.desc: Terrier Max is back and is coping with some major life changes. This chapter explores the emotional lives of our pets: the deep bond between them and the families that love them.

programme.title: The Sloth Lane
programme.desc: After a terrifying storm destroys their home, a speedy sloth named Laura and her kooky family move to the big city in their rusted old food truck hoping to make their business a success.

programme.title: Madagascar
programme.desc: Four spoiled animals from the New York Central Zoo escape with the unintentional help of four fugitive penguins. They subsequently find themselves in Madagascar amidst happy lemurs.

programme.title: Madagascar: Escape 2 Africa
programme.desc: Alex, Marty, Melman and Gloria find themselves in Africa, where Alex meets his long-lost parents. Meanwhile, Makunga, his father's rival, will stop at nothing to be the king of the jungle.

programme.title: Madagascar 3: Europe's Most Wanted
programme.desc: Alex, Marty, Gloria and Melman are still fighting to get home to their beloved Big Apple. Their journey takes them through Europe where they find the perfect cover, a travelling circus.

programme.title: Paddington
programme.desc: When a Peruvian bear travels to London in search of a home, he finds himself lost and alone at Paddington Station. This charming family comedy is based on the classic children's books.

programme.title: Despicable Me
programme.desc: In a happy neighbourhood with picket fences and rose bushes sits a black house with a dead lawn. In the cellar is a hideout where a dastardly villain is plotting a huge heist - he wants to steal the moon!

programme.title: Despicable Me 2
programme.desc: Get ready for more Minion madness! Just as Gru has given up being super-bad to be a super-dad, the Anti-Villain League recruits him to track down a new criminal mastermind and save the world.

programme.title: Venom
programme.desc: When Eddie Brock acquires the powers of a Symbiote, he will have to release his alter-ego 'Venom' to save his life.

programme.title: The Prestige
programme.desc: A mysterious story of two magicians whose intense rivalry leads them on a life-long battle for supremacy.

programme.title: Doomsday
programme.desc: In this futuristic action, it's been 25 years since a wall was built around Scotland to halt the Reaper virus. Now, London's in danger and a cure must be found while up north anarchy is rife.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible II
programme.desc: A secret agent is sent to Sydney to find and destroy a genetically modified disease called Chimera.

programme.title: Bloodshot
programme.desc: Bloodshot, an ex-killer for the mob, is kidnapped and injected with microscopic computers, turning him into a superhuman. Escaping his makers, he seeks revenge.

programme.title: The Great Wall
programme.desc: A group of European mercenaries become embroiled in the defense of the Great Wall of China in this epic adventure.

programme.title: White House Down
programme.desc: After being denied his dream job with the Secret Service, a cop with a bad attitude must save his daughter and the President after heavily armed militants take over the White House.

programme.title: Wonder Woman (2017)
programme.desc: Before she was Wonder Woman, she was Diana, princess of the Amazons. Fighting alongside man in a war to end all wars, she will discover her full powers and her true destiny.

programme.title: Escape Room: Tournament of Champions
programme.desc: Six strangers unwittingly find themselves locked in a maze of deadly rooms. Joining forces with two of the original survivors, they soon discover they've all played the game before.

programme.title: Fast & Furious 5
programme.desc: In this reunion of the fast and the furious, the speedsters are off to Brazil to attempt to defeat a corrupt businessman who wants them all wiped out.

programme.title: Interstellar

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: A spy is on a mission to disprove false accusations made against him by the very government organisation that he works for.

programme.title: Jack and Jill

programme.desc: Grizzled former professional baseball player Morris Buttermaker is recruited by a strait-laced lawyer to coach the Bears, a woefully inept Little League team.

programme.title: Uncle Buck

programme.title: Coming to America
programme.desc: Join an African prince on an unforgettable comic quest to the New World, as it's time for him to find a princess.

programme.title: The Killer Is Calling
programme.desc: When a mysterious killer targets a remote island town, a veteran 911 operator tries to uncover his motives and save her community, one emergency call at a time.

programme.title: The Killer I Picked Up
programme.desc: A hardworking single mother takes a side job as a rideshare driver to help pay for her daughter's college tuition. Things take a dark turn when she encounters a mysterious passenger.

programme.title: Match, Meet, Murder
programme.desc: A lingerie designer meets a handsome stranger who's smart, successful, and a former contestant on a dating show. However, she soon learns that the show wasn't the only secret he failed to mention.

programme.title: Crowdsource Murder
programme.desc: A friend encourages Monica to start a crowdsource fund to pay for her daughter's hospital bills. However, when a seemingly generous man donates more and more money, she begins to question his motives.

programme.title: Taken in Montana
programme.desc: When her parents go missing during a family vacation, a teen tries to put the clues together to find them, but she may be trusting the wrong people for help.

programme.title: Vanished in Death Valley
programme.desc: A teenage girl goes missing after her family's car breaks down in Death Valley. Her parents soon find some unexpected help as they embark on a desperate search to find her.

programme.title: Abducted In The Everglades
programme.desc: A college student vanishes during spring break in Miami. Her mother, with help from a local boatman, braves dangers to urgently search for her and unravel the mystery.

programme.title: The Killer Inside: The Ruth Finley Story
programme.desc: The kidnapping and sudden reappearance of Ruth Finley leave investigators scrambling for answers.

programme.title: Suitcase Killer: Melanie McGuire Story
programme.desc: A dramatisation of the romance and marriage of the McGuires, the 2004 murder of Bill, investigation and subsequent trial of Melanie, who dismembered and disposed of her husband's body in suitcases.

programme.title: Lies Between Friends
programme.desc: A wealthy family's world is turned upside down when the 18-year-old daughter of a family friend moves in with them for a few months.

programme.title: The Perfect Boyfriend
programme.desc: After struggling through a painful divorce, April decides to get back into the dating game and is swept off her feet by the handsome Jacob, who is hiding a dark side and a wife.

programme.title: Husband, Wife and Their Lover
programme.desc: A sexually charged thriller about Franklin and Bridget, a married couple in trouble.

programme.title: She Went Missing
programme.desc: A reporter's long-dormant stalker re-emerges when she returns to her hometown to investigative the disappearance of her childhood best friend.

programme.title: There's a New Killer in Town
programme.desc: Alice is living a quiet life in a small town when she meets Ronnie. However, one of her friends starts to suspect that there's more to him than meets the eye.

programme.title: Sisters
programme.desc: A reporter who witnesses a brutal murder becomes entangled in a mystery involving conjoined twins who were separated at birth.

programme.title: A Kidnapping in Amish Country
programme.desc: When an Amish woman discovers her daughter has been kidnapped, she turns to the only person who can help her estranged best friend, who has left the Amish way of life.

programme.title: Wild Target
programme.desc: An assassin with a peerless reputation for lethal efficiency finds himself drawn to one of his intended victims.

programme.title: The Angels' Share
programme.desc: Scotland. A whimsical crime caper about four crooks in Glasgow who find redemption, if not exactly rehabilitation, through an unlikely whisky heist.

programme.title: God Help The Girl
programme.desc: Life has never been easy for Eve, but this troubled young girl has a talent and songwriting becomes her way forward. Through her passion for music, she's led to Glasgow's music scene.

programme.title: Elstree 1976
programme.desc: Actors and extras reminisce about their time on the set of Star Wars (1977) and how making the film affected their lives.

programme.title: A United Kingdom
programme.desc: The true story of the King of Bechuanaland, and the London office worker he married despite fierce opposition from the British and South African governments.

programme.title: Versus: The Life & Films of Ken Loach
programme.desc: Ken Loach reflects on his 50-year career in socially aware dramas and documentaries, sharing successes, controversies, and personal challenges with insights from friends and family.

programme.title: Viceroy's House
programme.desc: The final Viceroy of India, Lord Mountbatten, is tasked with overseeing the transition of British India to independence, but meets with conflict as different sides clash.

programme.title: The Falling
programme.desc: As a mysterious fainting epidemic breaks out in a strict English girls' school, best friends Abbie and Lydia refuse to believe that there is nothing wrong, and set out to discover the truth.

programme.title: A Little Chaos

programme.title: Neds
programme.desc: Encompassed by violent street gangs, neglectful parents, bullying teachers and a lack of positive role models, a studious, but emotionally abandoned kid turns thug.

programme.title: The Happy Prince
programme.desc: After being imprisoned in England for his love affair with Lord Alfred Bosie Douglas, Oscar Wilde is penniless and in poor health, stumbling the streets of Paris.

programme.title: Mary Shelley
programme.desc: The love affair between poet Percy Shelley and 18-year-old Mary Wollstonecraft Godwin, which resulted in Mary Shelley writing Frankenstein.

programme.title: How to Talk to Girls at Parties

programme.desc: A journalist's wife needs her ex-lover's help after her husband is arrested in Southeast Asia.

programme.desc: The kids team up to create and market products from original ideas.
