programme.title: African Gem Day Begins!
programme.desc: Come with us on a journey into the wild as we explore Africa's exotic gem landscape. Enjoy a stunning selection of gems hand-picked by our jewellery team!

programme.title: HumanKind
programme.desc: Can one hour a week really change a child's future? In Melbourne, Marion Macaulay proves it can. Through Kids Hope, she's showing how consistent mentorship can be a beacon of hope for young lives.

programme.title: My Best Friend's Bouquet
programme.desc: A hopeless romantic misses all of the signs of true love when she puts her trust in a bouquet tossed at a wedding.

programme.title: Planetshakers
programme.desc: Join Planetshakers for their church service in Melbourne. A fresh Word with praise and worship each week. Live empowered.

programme.title: Jentezen Franklin
programme.sub-title: How to Redeem Your Family Name Series Part 2
programme.desc: Pastor Jentezen Franklin, brings meaning to spiritual truths found in God's Word. Kingdom Connection is the teaching ministry of Free Chapel, a multi-campus church.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: In this world, it's easy to get agitated and upset. But in Christ, we have the power to stay in peace. Learn how.

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.desc: With his respected position in Potiphar's house Joseph could have given in to temptation, but because he stayed true to his convictions and loyal to God, he was able to achieve victory over temptation.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Direct from Houston, Texas, join Joel and Victoria Osteen and the team from Lakewood Church for a session of powerful music and empowering preaching.

programme.title: Takeaways with Kirk Cameron
programme.sub-title: John Cooper on the Importance of Truth
programme.desc: Join Kirk Cameron to discuss pressing issues Christians are facing with compassionate, well-informed guests, and together, find actionable takeaways that we can use today.

programme.title: A Cathedral Pilgrimage
programme.desc: Secrets of Britain's Great Cathedrals explores cathedrals and abbeys found throughout England and Wales, featuring interviews with historians and experts and breathtaking footage filming their legendary facades.

programme.title: Jesus the Game Changer
programme.desc: Despite being the most influential figure in history, Jesus did not follow conventional patterns of leadership. His call for His followers to serve with humility is one of the most powerful and enduring ideas from His teaching.

programme.title: Veggie Tales
programme.desc: Two stories, told by the VeggieTales gang, talk about why it's important to love your neighbour.

programme.title: Night Owls & Early Birds
programme.sub-title: God's Love for us is Endless
programme.desc: Join Hoot, Savannah, Screech, Charlie, and Steve as they take a deeper dive into the truths found in God's Word.

programme.title: Arise Kids TV
programme.desc: Join the ARISE Kids TV team in the final week of our series - Limitless! This week we wrap up our series with this best bits episode! You don't want to miss it!

programme.title: Life with Paul De Jong
programme.desc: We like to call it 'soul food'. This program uses creative illustration, real life stories and biblical teaching to encourage and help viewers discover a greater purpose to their lives.

programme.title: Drive Thru History: The Gospels
programme.sub-title: Jesus Travels the Sea of Galilee
programme.desc: Dave Stotts takes us on his most exciting adventure yet as he tells the story of Jesus from the locations recorded in the Gospels of Matthew, Mark, Luke, and John.

programme.title: Soul Sessions
programme.desc: An exploration into the New Zealand gospel music scene with a focus on Pacific musicians and artists.

programme.title: Dream: Live with Purpose, Learn to Dream
programme.desc: Dream is a documentary series featuring the stories of diverse people from around the globe, who found purpose when they embraced their God-given dream.

programme.title: Sugarcreek Amish Mysteries
programme.desc: After Cheryl's devastating breakup, her aunt offers her an escape from Chicago to the Amish town of Sugarcreek. Struggling, Cheryl uncovers an unsettling secret that could disrupt the small town.

programme.title: The Good Neighbour
programme.desc: The Good Neighbour is a docuseries that explores the complexities of poverty and challenges viewers to think about what it means to be a 'good neighbour.'.

programme.title: Answers with Bayless Conley
programme.sub-title: The Lord Is My Shepherd Part 2
programme.desc: In part two of The Lord Is My Shepherd, Pastor Bayless looks at the peace and restoration Jesus promises His sheep.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Positioned In His Protection Pt 4 of 4
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Billy Graham Classics
programme.desc: Travel back in time to join Dr Billy Graham and his crusade team at the events that changed the lives of thousands around the world.

programme.title: Impact for Life
programme.desc: In today's episode, Peter Mortlock teaches on the topic of sacrifice. He shares how the church is built on sacrifice through Jesus and that through sacrifice comes great things.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: In this world, it's easy to get agitated and upset. But in Christ, we have the power to stay in peace. Learn how.

programme.title: Everytown Downunder
programme.desc: Follow Australia's most travelled music evangelist, Steve Grace and his team on a 25,000km road trip from bush to beach, performing 78 evangelical concerts, sharing their journeys and experiencing what Australia has to offer.

programme.title: Sugarcreek Amish Mysteries
programme.desc: After Cheryl's devastating breakup, her aunt offers her an escape from Chicago to the Amish town of Sugarcreek. Struggling, Cheryl uncovers an unsettling secret that could disrupt the small town.

programme.title: Compassion Stories
programme.desc: Victor comes from Rwanda, where in 1994 100 days of war and genocide shocked the world. But now a new story of radical healing and transformation is being written in the pages of history.

programme.title: GGC Life TV
programme.sub-title: The World Outside Your Window Pt-3
programme.desc: With a vision for a church that is real, life-changing, Glorious Gospel Church and their values are based firmly in the bible and their aim is to express the Good News of Jesus in a practical way.

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.desc: With his respected position in Potiphar's house Joseph could have given in to temptation, but because he stayed true to his convictions and loyal to God, he was able to achieve victory over temptation.

programme.title: The Catholic Guy
programme.sub-title: Transformation Begins with the Call to Conversion (1)
programme.desc: Bruce Downes is The Catholic Guy. Be prepared to laugh, learn and listen to what God is trying to say to you. Wherever you are around the world, God is never far from you.

programme.title: The Way of the Master
programme.desc: The Living Waters team takes the gospel to London during the Coronation of King Charles.

programme.title: Friends and Heroes
programme.desc: Friends and Heroes is an animated children's adventure based in Ancient Egypt, Israel and Rome. The story follows two young friends Macky and Portia as they fight for justice against the Roman Empire.

programme.title: Hillsong Kids: Cubbyhouse
programme.desc: An entertaining show for the little ones aged between 2 and 6, with songs, fun craft time, bible stories and animated teaching and illustrations.

programme.title: God Rocks! Playlist
programme.desc: Join kid-hosts Myles and Stella for a fun, non-stop musical playlist of hit songs about Faith and Trust!

programme.title: Hunter & Twerp Scripture Seekers
programme.desc: Welcome to the wonderful world of Brightington, home of Hunter and Twerp, Scripture Seekers! Stacks of fun Bible lessons for children to enjoy.

programme.title: Bible Man
programme.desc: Miles Peterson had everything: Money, power, fame. Until he lost it. Then Miles finds the power of God and harnesses that power to become Bibleman.

programme.title: Sea Kids
programme.desc: This program will help transform the heart and mind of every child as they learn how to tangibly live out biblical principles and build a strong foundation in Jesus.

programme.title: Whirl
programme.desc: A cartoon series about the loveable, enthusiastic kids of First Second Church. In each episode, the kids tackle a different theme that is central to Christian values. Everything from generosity and forgiveness to doubt.

programme.title: Lessons From The Bible
programme.desc: Join Pastor Doug, Dusty, Amelia and all the characters as they learn about the Bible and how it applies to daily life. Games, songs, and some silly puppets will inspire kids.

programme.title: Deditos
programme.sub-title: God And His People In The Wilderness
programme.desc: This quirky kids show introduces children to classic stories from the Old Testament using finger puppets.

programme.title: The Blello Show
programme.desc: Join Kyle, Lyds, Extra Bear, and Stu as they share with you some cool vids, catchy catch phrases crazy challenges, things you can do in 3 minutes, and other random stuff to make your life awesome.

programme.title: Cassino in Ischia
programme.desc: Nic Cassino goes to Italy to work with struggling Italian directors on the first-ever "Neo-Realist" action movie in an effort to revitalize his career.

programme.title: Sumotherhood
programme.desc: Two wannabe gangsters hold up a local bank, but when things don't go according to plan, a misunderstanding leads them into business with one of East London's most notorious gangs.

programme.title: Firebrand
programme.desc: Katherine Parr, Henry VIII's sixth wife, becomes regent while he battles abroad. When he returns sick and paranoid, she must fight for her survival.

programme.title: Spit
programme.desc: An ex-con returns to Australia after 20 years, gets detained, faces old enemies, makes new friends, and teaches his version of mateship while staying one step ahead.

programme.title: French Girl
programme.desc: Gordon, a high school teacher from Brooklyn, goes with his girlfriend and chef Sophie to her hometown of Quebec City, where she is testing for the Michelin 3-star restaurant of Ruby Collins.

programme.title: Good Luck To You, Leo Grande
programme.desc: Retired teacher, Nancy, embarks on a post-marital sexual awakening with sex worker, Leo who draws on all his skills and charm, and together they find a surprising human connection.

programme.title: Sidelined: The QB and Me
programme.desc: A headstrong dancer and a cocky quarterback fight against their feelings for each other as their post-grad future threatens to keep them apart.

programme.title: The Three Musketeers - Part II: Milady
programme.desc: Constance Bonacieux is kidnapped before D'Artagnan's very eyes. The young musketeer, aided by Athos, Porthos and Aramis, is forced to join the mysterious Milady de Winter.

programme.title: I.S.S.
programme.desc: Tensions flare in the near-future aboard the International Space Station as a conflict breaks out on Earth.

programme.title: Immaculate
programme.desc: A woman of devout faith is offered a new role at an illustrious convent. But, it soon becomes clear that her new home harbours dark and horrifying secrets.

programme.title: Strange Way of Life
programme.desc: After 25 years, Silva rides a horse across the desert to visit his friend Sheriff Jake. They celebrate the meeting, but the next morning Jake tells him the reason for his trip.

programme.title: Watchmen: Chapter I
programme.desc: In an alternate world, the murder of a government sponsored superhero draws his outlawed colleagues out of retirement, into a mystery that threatens their lives and the world itself.

programme.title: Watchmen: Chapter II
programme.desc: Former heroes face threats. The Comedian is dead, Dr. Manhattan exiled to Mars, Ozymandias survived an attack and Rorschach is arrested.

programme.title: If
programme.desc: After discovering she can see everyone's imaginary friends, a girl embarks on a magical adventure to reconnect forgotten IFs with their kids.

programme.title: Maria
programme.desc: Famed opera singer Maria Callas retreats to Paris in the 1970s after a glamorous yet tumultuous life in the public eye.

programme.title: Man of Steel
programme.desc: A man learns that he has extraordinary powers and is not of this Earth. But the hero in him must emerge if he is to save the world from annihilation and become the symbol of hope for all mankind.

programme.title: Blade
programme.desc: Blade - half-mortal, half-immortal - fights vampires who crave his special blood type for their plan to exterminate the human race.

programme.title: Morbius
programme.desc: Biochemist Dr Michael Morbius tries to cure himself of a rare blood disease, but he inadvertently infects himself with a form of vampirism instead.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (2014)
programme.desc: Based on the hit '90s animation, the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles are back and have teamed up with news reporter April O'Neill to save New York City from the evil Shredder.

programme.title: The Dark Knight Rises
programme.desc: It has been years since Batman vanished into the night, turning from hero to fugitive. Everything will change with the arrival of a cunning cat burglar, and the emergence of masked terrorist, Bane.

programme.title: Venom
programme.desc: When Eddie Brock acquires the powers of a Symbiote, he will have to release his alter-ego 'Venom' to save his life.

programme.title: Venom: Let There Be Carnage
programme.desc: In search of his next big story, Eddie lands an exclusive interview with convicted murderer Cletus Kasady, who discovers Eddie's secret and becomes the host for Carnage.

programme.title: Venom: The Last Dance
programme.desc: Eddie Brock and Venom must make a devastating decision as they're pursued by a mysterious military man and alien monsters from Venom's home world.

programme.title: Aquaman
programme.desc: The origin story of half-human, half-Atlantean Arthur Curry takes him on the journey of his lifetime-to discover if he is worthy of who he was born to be a king.

programme.title: Wonder Woman 1984
programme.desc: In the vibrant, sleek 1980s, Wonder Woman will have to muster all her strength, wisdom and courage as she finds herself squaring off against Maxwell Lord and the Cheetah.

programme.title: Man of Steel
programme.desc: A man learns that he has extraordinary powers and is not of this Earth. But the hero in him must emerge if he is to save the world from annihilation and become the symbol of hope for all mankind.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse
programme.desc: Brooklyn teen Miles Morales is introduced to the limitless possibilities of the Spider-Verse, where more than one can wear the mask.

programme.title: Spider-Man
programme.desc: After a radioactive spider bite, a nerdy teen develops keen senses and amazing strength.

programme.title: Despicable Me 2
programme.desc: Get ready for more Minion madness! Just as Gru has given up being super-bad to be a super-dad, the Anti-Villain League recruits him to track down a new criminal mastermind and save the world.

programme.title: Despicable Me 3
programme.desc: Everyone's favourite reformed super-villain Gru returns for more adventures with Lucy, their daughters, and the lovably zany minions.

programme.title: Despicable Me 4
programme.desc: Gru welcomes a new member to the family, Gru Jr, who's intent on tormenting his dad. However, their peaceful existence soon comes crashing down, when criminal mastermind Maxime Le Mal escapes from prison.

programme.title: Hop
programme.desc: An egg emergency ensues when the rock 'n' roll-loving teen son of the Easter Bunny shirks his responsibility and runs away from home.

programme.title: Sing
programme.desc: A dapper koala who has fallen on hard times has one final chance to restore his crumbling theatre by producing the world's greatest singing competition.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda 3
programme.desc: The plump black-and-white bear, Po, is back in his biggest adventure yet.

programme.title: Puss in Boots
programme.desc: After Puss in Boots was blamed for a bank robbery in San Ricardo, engineered against his wishes by Humpty Dumpty, Puss leaves Humpty to his fate. Now reunited, they try to trust each other again.

programme.title: Uncharted
programme.desc: Street-smart Nathan Drake is recruited by seasoned treasure hunter Victor 'Sully' Sullivan to recover a fortune amassed by Ferdinand Magellan, and lost 500 years ago.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda
programme.desc: Clumsy and overweight panda, Po, dreams of becoming a kung fu master.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda 2
programme.desc: Po is now living his dream as The Dragon Warrior. But his new life is threatened by the emergence of a formidable villain, who plans to use a secret weapon to conquer China.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda 3
programme.desc: The plump black-and-white bear, Po, is back in his biggest adventure yet.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda 4
programme.desc: After three death-defying adventures, Po, the Dragon Warrior is called upon by destiny to become the spiritual leader of the Valley of Peace.

programme.title: Balto
programme.desc: A true story of a sled dog who braved the Alaskan wilderness to carry life-saving medicine to a remote village in 1925. A remarkable tale of a hero who inspired a nation.

programme.title: Spirit Untamed
programme.desc: The next chapter in this beloved franchise begins as a young girl finds a connection to her mother's legacy as a trick rider and forms a bond with a wild mustang named Spirit.

programme.title: Flushed Away
programme.desc: An upper crust rodent lost in London's sewers gets a savvy female rat to save him from Le Frog, a French mercenary.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: A spy is on a mission to disprove false accusations made against him by the very government organisation that he works for.

programme.title: Jurassic World: Fallen Kingdom
programme.desc: When the abandoned island's dormant volcano begins roaring to life, Owen and Claire mount a campaign to rescue the remaining dinosaurs from this extinction-level event.

programme.title: The Accountant
programme.desc: A math savant with more affinity for numbers than people works as a freelance accountant for some of the world's most dangerous criminal organisations.

programme.title: White House Down
programme.desc: After being denied his dream job with the Secret Service, a cop with a bad attitude must save his daughter and the President after heavily armed militants take over the White House.

programme.title: Pacific Rim: Uprising
programme.desc: Jake, a once-promising Jaeger pilot, has given up his training only to be caught up in a criminal underworld. He's given one last chance when an unstoppable threat is unleashed.

programme.title: Gladiator
programme.desc: Forced into slavery by the corrupt heir to the throne, Roman general Maximus becomes a gladiator. His prowess in the arena leads him to Rome, the Colosseum, and a showdown with the new emperor.

programme.title: Oblivion
programme.desc: A security repairman stationed on a desolate future Earth rescues a beautiful stranger from a downed spacecraft. Her arrival will trigger a chain of events that will leave man's fate in his hands.

programme.title: After Earth
programme.desc: A crashlanding puts a father and son on a dangerous planet - Earth. Hunted by an alien and by evolved animal species, the pair must work together to survive.

programme.title: Halloween Kills
programme.desc: Survivors of Michael Myer's first rampage decide to take matters into their own hands, forming a vigilante mob that sets out to hunt Michael down, once and for all.

programme.title: The Grudge
programme.desc: A house is cursed by a vengeful ghost that curses those who enter it with a violent death.

programme.title: The Tiger's Apprentice
programme.desc: Tom Lee discovers he is part of a long lineage of magical protectors known as the Guardians. With guidance from a mythical tiger named Hu, Tom trains to take on an evil force that threatens humanity.

programme.title: Doom
programme.desc: A frantic call for help from a remote research station on Mars sends a team of mercenary Marines into action.

programme.title: The Scorpion King
programme.desc: The ruler of wicked Gomorrah, who relies on a sorcerer's visions, lays waste to the tribes of the desert. The survivors hire an assassin to kill the sorcerer who turns out to be a beautiful woman.

programme.title: Van Helsing
programme.desc: Legendary monster hunter Van Helsing must rely on the help of the beautiful and mysterious Anna Valeris as he engages in an epic battle with the ultimate forces of darkness.

programme.title: Talladega Nights

programme.title: Zombieland: Double Tap
programme.desc: Through comic mayhem from the White House to the heartland, four slayers face off against new kinds of evolved zombies and new human survivors.

programme.title: The Hangover

programme.title: The Hangover Part II
programme.desc: Phil, Stu and their mates travel to Thailand for Stu's subdued pre-wedding brunch after the unforgettable bachelor party in Vegas. However, things don't go to plan.

programme.title: Couples Retreat
programme.desc: Four bickering couples embark on a journey to a tropical island resort. While one of the couples is there to work on their marriage, the other three set out to enjoy some fun in the sun.

programme.desc: Carrie becomes distraught when a car accident takes her sister Riley's life. As the investigation commences, she discovers that the accident might not be the true cause of Riley's death.

programme.desc: Tusk Johnson returns to Lone Moose and asks Beef and Wolf a favour. Meanwhile, Honeybee enters a contest to win her own mall kiosk.

programme.title: The Great North
programme.desc: Beef helps Jerry track down his stolen Bigfoot costume before Christmas. Meanwhile, the Tobin kids work on an elaborate gingerbread village.

programme.title: The Great North
programme.desc: Moon helps Wolf deal with their parents' divorce. Honeybee encounters Lone Moose's most famous city councilperson, who happens to be an eagle.

programme.title: The Great North
programme.desc: Beef joins a local mum's group while Moon builds a Dread Sled with his friends. Meanwhile, the rest of the family attempt to solve the mystery of Wolf and Honeybee's haunted potholder.

programme.title: The Great North
programme.desc: Judy relaunches a secret society called the Saved by the Spells. While, Honeybee and Wolf have a surprising week, and Moon makes a new friend on his CB radio.

programme.title: The Great North
programme.desc: Judy wants to be cast as one of the leads in a school musical based on The Perfect Storm. Meanwhile, Moon tries to convince the rest of the family that he's ready to be home alone.

programme.title: The Great North
programme.desc: Honeybee helps Moon with his school problems and discovers he has something else on his mind, while the rest of the family have a problem with a moose.

programme.title: The Great North
programme.sub-title: As Goldie As It Gets Adventure
programme.desc: Ham befriends an older woman with a love of partying. Meanwhile, Judy takes up pottery and discovers she isn't very good at it.

programme.title: The Great North
programme.desc: After seeing something he shouldn't have, Moon incurs Debbie's wrath. Meanwhile, Beef is determined to save his favourite museum from being closed down.

programme.title: The Great North
programme.desc: Beef struggles when the boat needs repairs and he can't fish for a whole week. Meanwhile, Wolf and Honeybee meet the best-looking man in Lone Moose.

programme.title: The Great North
programme.desc: Wolf chaperones Ham and Judy on a school field trip to the abandoned Death Cliff Prison. Meanwhile, Beef accidentally agrees to compose a poem.

programme.title: The Great North
programme.desc: With Crispin's help, Ham tries to re-create a more theatrical version of his coming out. Meanwhile, hoping to record their first true crime podcast, Wolf and Honeybee investigate a local cold case.

programme.title: The Great North
programme.desc: Wolf is the only Tobin who doesn't want to go to the new indoor water park in Lone Moose because he believes he's cursed to always lose his swim trunks in public.

programme.desc: Real Missionaries, doing real work, helping real people in real remote parts of Alaska. With breathtaking scenery, adventurous landscapes and down to earth personalities, this show just might become your family favourite.

programme.title: Sugarcreek Amish Mysteries
programme.desc: After Cheryl's devastating breakup, her aunt offers her an escape from Chicago to the Amish town of Sugarcreek. Struggling, Cheryl uncovers an unsettling secret that could disrupt the small town.

programme.title: An American in Austen
programme.desc: Harriet, who thinks that no real man compares to Mr Darcy, is transported into Pride and Prejudice and gets an unexpected chance to find out.

programme.title: Live @ Psalter Studios
programme.desc: Docu-music series featuring an array of Christian musicians including such artists as Josh Cunningham (The Waifs), Anna Weatherup (The Voice 2013) and Castles In Air, an Indie Rock band from California.

programme.title: Hour of Power
programme.desc: Pastor Bobby Schuller provides spiritual principles and practices that can help people become happy students of Jesus and live a life of meaning.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Direct from Houston, Texas, join Joel and Victoria Osteen and the team from Lakewood Church for a session of powerful music and empowering preaching.

programme.title: Give Me an Answer

programme.title: Wedding Bells

programme.title: Centuries Collide

programme.title: The Divine Adventure

programme.title: Smoketown

programme.title: Life with Paul De Jong
programme.desc: We like to call it 'soul food'. This program uses creative illustration, real life stories and biblical teaching to encourage and help viewers discover a greater purpose to their lives.

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.desc: With his respected position in Potiphar's house Joseph could have given in to temptation, but because he stayed true to his convictions and loyal to God, he was able to achieve victory over temptation.

programme.title: Planetshakers
programme.desc: Join Planetshakers for their church service in Melbourne. A fresh Word with praise and worship each week. Live empowered.

programme.title: A Very Tall Man
programme.desc: Gary Hoogvliet, a very tall man, interviews interesting folk, not quite as tall as he, but nevertheless with fascinating and inspiring stories to tell.

programme.title: The Last Bridesmaid
programme.desc: Becca is always a bridesmaid, but at her cousin's wedding she bonds with Kyle, the videographer covering every stage of the planning. Perhaps she won't be the last woman standing for long.

programme.title: Billy Graham Classics

programme.title: David Jeremiah

programme.title: In Touch

programme.title: The Watchers

programme.title: Caddo Lake

programme.title: The Fall Guy

programme.title: Lisa Frankenstein

programme.title: Gary

programme.title: Speak No Evil

programme.title: Caddo Lake
programme.desc: When an eight-year-old girl mysteriously vanishes, a series of past deaths and disappearances start to link together, forever altering a broken family's history.

programme.title: Spider-Man
programme.desc: After a radioactive spider bite, a nerdy teen develops keen senses and amazing strength.

programme.title: Spider-Man 2
programme.desc: Peter Parker struggles to juggle his life with his Spider-Man persona as a new foe emerges: the deranged scientist, Otto Octavius.

programme.title: Spider-Man 3
programme.desc: The web-spinning superhero must battle his own demons and a barrage of new villains including Sandman and Venom.

programme.title: The Amazing Spider-Man
programme.desc: After Peter Parker is bitten by a genetically altered spider, he gains new-found, spider-like powers and ventures out to save the city from the machinations of a mysterious reptilian foe.

programme.title: The Amazing Spider-Man 2
programme.desc: Spider-Man's greatest battle begins when an evil corporation attempts world domination by deploying an army of super villains to crush Peter Parker.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Homecoming
programme.desc: A young Peter Parker/Spider-Man begins to navigate his new-found identity as the web-slinging superhero.

programme.title: Spider-Man: No Way Home

programme.title: Blade

programme.title: Morbius

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (2014)

programme.title: Combat Wombat: Back 2 Back
programme.desc: An evil tech genius threatens to turn the city into a metaverse simulation, leaving the Combat Wombat to save the day.

programme.title: Batman Begins

programme.title: Flushed Away
programme.desc: An upper crust rodent lost in London's sewers gets a savvy female rat to save him from Le Frog, a French mercenary.

programme.title: Stuart Little 2
programme.desc: Stuart, the Little family's lonely mouse 'son', gets into strife by befriending a canary.

programme.title: Chicken Run
programme.desc: A smooth-talking rooster crash-lands into a farm and attempts to help a group of chickens escape. With teamwork and a little bit of cluck, the fearless flock plots one last daring attempt for freedom.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania 2
programme.desc: Worried that his half-vampire grandson isn't showing signs of being a vampire, Dracula enlists his friends to put him through 'monster-in-training' boot camp.

programme.title: The Road to El Dorado
programme.desc: Get ready for an exhilarating ride of a lifetime! Join Tulio and Miguel and their hilarious horse Altivo as they set sail, map in hand, in search of golden treasure.

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon

programme.title: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: An experiment with dinosaurs created from DNA becomes a disaster when sabotage sets the prehistoric monsters loose in an island theme park.

programme.title: Shrek
programme.desc: An ogre, with the help of an annoying donkey, tries to win back his swamp by returning a princess to a scheming lord.

programme.desc: Happily ever after will have to wait as Shrek, Princess Fiona, and Donkey visit the in-laws. Outraged that Fiona has wed an ogre, the King hires hit man Puss in Boots to make the problem disappear.

programme.title: Migration

programme.title: Dr. Seuss' the Lorax
programme.desc: A young boy searches for the one thing that will enable him to win the affection of the girl of his dreams. He must discover the story of the Lorax, the creature who fights to protect his world.

programme.title: Mr. Peabody & Sherman
programme.desc: When Mr Peabody and Sherman break the rules of time travel by meeting many of history's greatest characters, they must repair the damage they have done before it changes their world forever.

programme.title: Grand-Daddy Day Care
programme.desc: When Frank Collins suffers from writer's block, he decides to start a day care for his father-in-law and other seniors as a way to make quick cash.

programme.title: Antz
programme.desc: A worker ant changes roles with a soldier ant to woo a forbidden princess.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: When the evil wizard Gargamel chases the tiny blue Smurfs out of their village, they tumble from their magical world into New York City.

programme.title: Pixels

programme.title: Van Helsing

programme.title: The Hunt

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Ghost Protocol

programme.title: Fast & Furious Presents: Hobbs & Shaw

programme.title: Snitch

programme.title: Charlie's Angels
programme.desc: When a devious mastermind embroils them in a plot to destroy individual privacy, the Angels set out to bring down the bad guys. But a revelation makes the Angels targets for assassination.

programme.title: Charlie's Angels: Full Throttle

programme.title: The Italian Job

programme.title: The Fate of the Furious

programme.title: Welcome to the Jungle

programme.title: Land of the Dead

programme.desc: When a reckless CIA agent and a brilliant pickpocket uncover a large-scale conspiracy, they must work together in order to take down a common enemy.

programme.title: Ted 2

programme.title: Knocked Up

programme.desc: Set in a small town in 1959 England, a woman decides, against polite but ruthless local opposition, to open a bookshop, a decision which becomes a political minefield.

programme.title: Red Joan
programme.desc: Inspired by the true story of English-born Joan Stanley, who was recruited by the KGB in the mid 1930s and went undetected as a British spy for over a half a century.

programme.title: I Am Slave
programme.desc: A thriller set in London's slave trade and centred on a woman's fight for freedom.

programme.title: A Long Way Down
programme.desc: Four people considering ending their own lives suddenly find a little sunshine when they come together on New Year's Eve.

programme.title: Farming
programme.desc: A young Nigerian boy is sent to be raised by a white British family in the hopes of a better future, and instead becomes the leader of a white skinhead gang.

programme.title: Brooklyn
programme.desc: An Irish immigrant lands in 1950s Brooklyn, where she falls in love with a local. But when her past catches up with her, she must choose between two countries.

programme.title: The Shadow of Violence
programme.desc: In rural Ireland, an ex-boxer who has an autistic son and is the feared enforcer for a drug-dealing family has his loyalties tested when he's asked to kill for the first time.

programme.title: Into the White
programme.desc: During World War II, enemy fighter pilots find themselves face to face after shooting down one another's planes over a desolate landscape. In order to survive, they must set aside the rules of war.

programme.title: Stardust (2020)
programme.desc: Meet David before Bowie, one of the greatest icons in music history. But who was the young man behind the many faces?

programme.title: Nowhere Special
programme.desc: A single father dedicates the last few months of his life to finding a new family for his four-year-old son.

programme.title: Testament of Youth
programme.desc: Based on the World War I memoir by Vera Brittain, the tale of one woman's searing journey from youthful hopes and dreams to the edge of despair and back again.

programme.title: The Secret Scripture
programme.desc: A woman committed to a mental hospital for much of her life must rely on her diary to recount her memories to a doctor who is reassessing her for the move to a new facility.

programme.title: Journey's End
programme.desc: March, 1918. C-company arrives to take its turn in the front-line trenches in northern France, led by the war-weary Captain Stanhope.

programme.title: The Shadow of Violence
programme.desc: In rural Ireland, an ex-boxer who has an autistic son and is the feared enforcer for a drug-dealing family has his loyalties tested when he's asked to kill for the first time.

programme.title: Into the White
programme.desc: During World War II, enemy fighter pilots find themselves face to face after shooting down one another's planes over a desolate landscape. In order to survive, they must set aside the rules of war.

programme.title: Storm Boy
programme.desc: Storm Boy lives an idyllic life where the Murray River meets the sea. But, growing up, he is forced to choose between a life of continued isolation and the challenges of the outside world.

programme.title: Skippy
programme.desc: With Mark's help, Jerry attempts to recover from injuries and win a surf race. Matt and Clancy are busy troubleshooting at Waratah National Park.

programme.title: A Town Like Alice
programme.desc: Joe and Jean have a strained reunion as Strachan heads to Queensland.

programme.title: Wake in Fright
programme.desc: A teacher spirals into degradation when he is stranded in a menacing Outback town. This 1971 classic with Gary Bond and Chips Rafferty has been restored in its original uncompromising form.

programme.title: Kadaicha
programme.desc: Residents of a housing development face danger after discovering it is built on a sacred Aboriginal graveyard with a curse on anyone who disturbs it.

programme.title: Night Of Fear
programme.desc: Insane sadistic hermit stalks and captures those who get lost in his part of the woods. A young woman whose car breaks down is about to find out what he does with them next.

programme.title: Body Melt
programme.desc: A mad scientist's vitamin pill causes horrific side effects in its suburbanite consumers.

programme.title: Skippy
programme.desc: A boy who escaped from a youth correctional centre wreaks havoc in Waratah National Park.

programme.title: The History of Australian Surfing
programme.desc: Presents the history of surfing in Australia from its origin in 1915, through its development with wooden boards, the Malibu revolution of the 50s and 60s, and into the radical 80s.

programme.title: Windrider
programme.desc: A female rock singer romances a champion surfer, but just as it seems life couldn't get better setbacks threaten a wipeout. Nicole Kidman stars in her first adult role, with Tom Burlinson.

programme.title: Dating the Enemy
programme.desc: Two lovers switch bodies. He's confronted with fashion fetish and monthly cycles, she finds that being cool and handsome is no picnic.

programme.title: Inn of the Damned
programme.desc: A sheriff investigates why the guests at a local hostelry check in, but never check out.

programme.title: Night Of Fear
programme.desc: Insane sadistic hermit stalks and captures those who get lost in his part of the woods. A young woman whose car breaks down is about to find out what he does with them next.

programme.title: Body Melt
programme.desc: A mad scientist's vitamin pill causes horrific side effects in its suburbanite consumers.

programme.title: The Chant of Jimmie Blacksmith
programme.desc: The true story of a part aboriginal man who finds the pressure of adapting to white culture intolerable, and as a result snaps in a violent and horrific manner.

programme.title: Skippy
programme.desc: A boy who escaped from a youth correctional centre wreaks havoc in Waratah National Park.

programme.title: Wills and Burke
programme.desc: A parody of the two 19th-century explorers who embarked on an ill-fated expedition across the Australian continent.

programme.title: The Rage in Placid Lake
programme.desc: This AFI winner puts a quirky spin on self-discovery when a lovable teen misfit decides to go straight after disastrously lifting the lid on his festering rage.
